title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Baby Theo plays peek-a-boo with his favorite bedtime friends hiding around his room before settling down for a cozy night's sleep.

pages.text: It's bedtime for Theo! But where are all his sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes standing in his nursery wearing soft blue pajamas. Various toys and blankets are partially visible behind furniture, creating a peek-a-boo composition with hidden elements waiting to be discovered.
illustration.alt: Theo in pajamas in his nursery with hidden toys around the room

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Behind the curtain... it's Teddy Bear! Hello, Teddy!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pulling back a soft yellow curtain to reveal a brown teddy bear. The curtain is partially concealed, creating a surprise element as the bear emerges from its hiding spot behind the fabric.
illustration.alt: Theo discovering his teddy bear hiding behind a curtain

pages.text: Where's Bunny? Peek-a-boo! Under the blanket! There you are, Bunny!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifting a soft pink blanket to reveal a white stuffed bunny underneath. The bunny is partially hidden with playful concealment, creating an interactive feel as it's discovered in its cozy hiding place.
illustration.alt: Theo finding his bunny hiding under a pink blanket

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, little duck! Behind the pillow! Come out and say goodnight!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peeking around a fluffy white pillow to find a yellow rubber duck. The duck is partially concealed behind the pillow, creating a behind-the-curtain effect with a surprise element as it's revealed.
illustration.alt: Theo discovering a rubber duck hiding behind a pillow

pages.text: All friends found! Time for bed. Peek-a-boo... sleepy Theo! Goodnight!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes tucked in bed with his teddy bear, bunny, and duck around him. A soft blanket is pulled up partially concealing his sleepy face, creating a gentle peek-a-boo composition as he drifts off to sleep.
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully in bed with all his stuffed animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Teddy Bear hiding?
questions.explanation: Teddy Bear was hiding behind the yellow curtain in Theo's room!

questions.question: What was hiding under the blanket?
questions.explanation: The white bunny was hiding under the soft pink blanket!

questions.question: What does Theo do at the end?
questions.explanation: Theo goes to sleep with all his favorite stuffed animals after finding them all!
